message:
test(core): expand 4 core crates — audit(+173), testkit(+115), ratelimit(+132), streaming(+89)

fcp-audit: 0→173 tests. Built comprehensive audit chain and receipt
primitives with full coverage of Severity, TraceContext, AuditEntry,
ChainHead, Decision, DecisionReceipt, AuditFilter, VerifyReport,
AuditError, FreshnessLevel, AuditStatus, and verify_chain function.

fcp-testkit: 126→241 tests across 7 files. Expanded fixtures, log_scan,
assertions, async_harness, tracing_config, harness, supervisor_examples.

fcp-ratelimit: 173→305 tests across 7 files. Added coverage for
token_bucket, sliding_window, leaky_bucket, backoff, headers, fcp
integration, and core config/state/error types.

fcp-streaming: 213→302 tests across 4 files. Expanded SSE parser,
WebSocket message/config/client, error types, and constants.

All clippy clean with -D warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
